stories.title: What makes Gavin McKenna the expected No. 1 pick i...
stories.summary: McKenna's story has taken him from Whitehorse, Yukon, to Medicine Hat to Penn State, with the NHL expected to be the next stop. What makes him a special prospect?

stories.title: How does the NHL draft lottery work? Everything yo...
stories.summary: Which teams can move up to No. 1? What are their chances? Who are the best players available?

stories.title: Diggs found not guilty of assault, strangulation
stories.summary: A jury found former New England Patriots receiver Stefon Diggs not guilty on charges of felony strangulation and misdemeanor assault and battery on Tuesday.

stories.title: Sources: NFL, refs on verge of agreeing on CBA
stories.summary: Negotiations between the NFL and NFL Referees Association on a new CBA have progressed far enough that the union has scheduled a ratification vote Thursday night, sources said.

stories.title: Saka fires Arsenal to 1st UCL final in 20 years
stories.summary: Bukayo Saka fired Arsenal to their first Champions League final in 20 years, with his goal late in the first half enough to beat Atlético Madrid 1-0.
